  • Module

  • Tree

Uses of Class
org.kink_lang.kink.Val

Packages that use Val
Package
Description
org.kink_lang.kink
The core package of the Kink vm.
org.kink_lang.kink.hostfun
Interfaces used to make a host fun, which is a FunVal to perform action in Java code.
org.kink_lang.kink.hostfun.graph
Provides the Execution Graph DSL, which is a convenient way to invoke Kink funs from Java actions or handlers.
org.kink_lang.kink.hostfun.graph.impl
Implementations of the Execution Graph DSL.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.compile.tempval
Temporary vals used by generated code.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.intrinsicsupport
Provides funs used from intrinsics.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.mod.java
Package of JAVA etc.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.mod.random
The internal classes for mods under kink/random.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.mod.stopwatch
Provides kink/STOPWATCH mod.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.num
Provides utility classes around numbers.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.vec
Internal representation of vec vals.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Val
    CallContext.arg(int index)
    Returns the arg of the current call at the index.
    Val
    CallContext.recv()
    Returns the actual receiver of the current call.
    Methods in org.kink_lang.kink.hostfun with parameters of type Val
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CallFlowToOn
    CallFlowToArgs.args(Val arg0)
    Binds one arg to the flow.
    CallFlowToOn
    CallFlowToArgs.args(Val... args)
    Binds the args to the flow.
    CallFlowToOn
    CallFlowToArgs.args(Val arg0, Val arg1)
    Binds two args to the flow.
    CallFlowToOn
    CallFlowToArgs.args(Val arg0, Val arg1, Val arg2)
    Binds the three args to the flow.
    CallFlowToOn
    CallFlowToArgs.args(Val arg0, Val arg1, Val arg2, Val arg3)
    Binds the four args to the flow.
    CallFlowToOn
    CallFlowToArgs.args(Val arg0, Val arg1, Val arg2, Val arg3, Val arg4)
    Binds the five args to the flow.
    CallFlowToRecv
    HostContext.call(Val ownerRecv, int symHandle)
    Returns a call flow to call a method of ownerRecv with no args.
    HostResult
    HostFunReaction.reaction(HostContext ctx, Val calleeResult)
    Performs reaction on the result of invocation.
    CallFlowToArgs
    CallFlowToRecv.recv(Val recv)
    Binds the recv to the flow.

  • Uses of Val in org.kink_lang.kink.internal.num

    Methods in org.kink_lang.kink.internal.num with parameters of type Val
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static int
    NumOperations.getElemIndex(Val val, int size)
    Returns the exact int value of the val, if the val is a NumVal and it represents a valid element index exactly in the sequence which has the size size, otherwise returns -1.
    static BigInteger
    NumOperations.getExactBigInteger(Val val)
    Returns an exact BigInteger from the val, if the val is a NumVal and it represents an int number.
    static OptionalInt
    NumOperations.getExactInt(Val val)
    Returns an exact int number from the val, if the val is a NumVal and it represents the exact int number.
    static OptionalLong
    NumOperations.getExactLongBetween(Val val, long min, long max)
    Returns an exact long number from the val, if the val is a NumVal and it represents the exact long number between min and max.
    static int
    NumOperations.getPosIndex(Val val, int size)
    Returns the exact int value of the val, if the val is a NumVal and it represents a valid position index exactly in the sequence which has the size size, otherwise returns -1.
